* [[小菅神社 (葛飾区)]] - [[東京都]][[葛飾区]]鎮座 * [[小菅神社 (飯山市)]] - [[長野県]][[飯山市]]鎮座。[[小菅山]]と称されて、[[戸隠山]]や[[飯縄山]]とならぶ信州三大修験霊場の一つであった
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:こすけしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]][[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:小菅神社]]<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:小菅神社]][[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:小菅神社]][[ja:小菅神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:小菅神社]] [[Category:小菅神社]] [[Category:小菅神社]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:小菅神社]][[Category:小菅神社]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

'''Kosuge Jinja''' (小菅神社) is a {{ill|shrine|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|小菅神社 (葛飾区)}} - {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}{{ill|Katsushika Ward|ja|葛飾区}} enshrined * {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)}} - {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iiyama|ja|飯山市}} enshrined. It was known as {{ill|Kosugeyama|ja|小菅山}} and, along with {{ill|Mount Togakushi|ja|戸隠山}} and {{ill|Mount Iinawa|ja|飯縄山}}, was one of the three major Shugendō sacred sites in Shinshu.
{{Disambiguation}}
<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->

[[sn:Kosuge Shrine]] [[sn:Kosuge Shrine]]

'''Kosuge Jinja''' (小菅神社) is a {{ill|shrine|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|小菅神社 (葛飾区)}} - {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}{{ill|Katsushika Ward|ja|葛飾区}} enshrined * {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)}} - {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iiyama|ja|飯山市}} enshrined. It was known as {{ill|Kosugeyama|ja|小菅山}} and, along with {{ill|Mount Togakushi|ja|戸隠山}} and {{ill|Mount Iinawa|ja|飯縄山}}, was one of the three major Shugendō sacred sites in Shinshu.
{{Disambiguation}}

* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|小菅神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}{{ill|Katsushika Ward|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}} enshrined * {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)|12=draft}} - {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}{{ill|Iiyama|ja|飯山市|12=draft}} enshrined. It was known as {{ill|Kosugeyama|ja|小菅山|12=draft}} and, along with {{ill|Mount Togakushi|ja|戸隠山|12=draft}} and {{ill|Mount Iinawa|ja|飯縄山|12=draft}}, was one of the three major Shugendō sacred sites in Shinshu.
{{Disambiguation}}
<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:short pages that need to be lengthened so that this properly works]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:500 shortest pages as of 03-29-2025]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[ja:小菅神社]] [[sn:Kosuge Shrine]] [[en:Kosuge Shrine]]

'''Kosuge Jinja''' (小菅神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]].

* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|小菅神社 (葛飾区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|qq=}} - [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]][[:en:Katsushika|Katsushika Ward]] enshrined
* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|qq=}} - [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iiyama, Nagano|Iiyama]] enshrined. It was known as {{ill|Kosugeyama|ja|小菅山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosugeyama|qq=|1=Kosugeyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463528}} and, along with [[:en:Mount Togakushi|Mount Togakushi]] and [[:en:Mount Iizuna|Mount Iinawa]], was one of the three major Shugendō sacred sites in Shinshu.

{{Disambiguation}}

{{translated page|ja|小菅神社|version=39430926|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小菅神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小菅神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小菅神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11463536]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11463536]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kosuge Jinja''' (小菅神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=shrine}}.
* {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|小菅神社 (葛飾区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Shrine (Katsushika)|qq=}} - {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}{{ill|Katsushika|en|Katsushika|WD=Q232628|lt=Katsushika Ward}} enshrined * {{ill|Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|ja|小菅神社 (飯山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Shrine (Iiyama)|qq=}} - {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Iiyama, Nagano|en|Iiyama, Nagano|WD=Q851097|lt=Iiyama}} enshrined. It was known as {{ill|Kosugeyama|ja|小菅山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosugeyama|1=Kosugeyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463528}} and, along with {{ill|Mount Togakushi|en|Mount Togakushi|WD=Q11496659|lt=Mount Togakushi}} and {{ill|Mount Iizuna|en|Mount Iizuna|WD=Q11666652|lt=Mount Iinawa}}, was one of the three major Shugendō sacred sites in Shinshu.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|小菅神社|version=39430926|comment=Imported full ja history}}
